title: Top matric achievers in Knysna announced
description: KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - On Friday evening,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - On Friday evening, 17 January, Knysna Mayor Thando Matika hosted a congratulatory ceremony recognising the top academic achievers from each school within the Greater Knysna Municipality.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - On Friday evening, 17 January, Knysna Mayor Thando Matika hosted a congratulatory ceremony recognising the top academic achievers from each school within the Greater Knysna Municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event celebrated learners who excelled in the 2025 matric examinations.","html":"The event celebrated learners who excelled in the 2025 matric examinations."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Kate Oosthuizen from Knysna High School named the overall top achiever for Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VIDEO: Kyla Laing","html":"VIDEO: Kyla Laing"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Top matric achievers in Knysna announced
